Trip.title: Trip
Trip.description: Represents a shared travel group with unique members.

name.description: The custom name of the trip.

members.description: Array of Firebase user UIDs allowed to access the trip and expenses.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the trip was created.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: An accounting transaction record inside a single trip.

id.description: The unique ID of the expense record.

title.description: The description/name of the expense item.

paymentMethod.description: Who paid or how it was paid.

cardName.description: Optional card brand used for payment.

date.description: User selected date/time of the expense.

AllowedUser.title: AllowedUser
AllowedUser.description: Represents a whitelisted user email allowed to access the app.

/trips/{tripId}.description: The root document for a shared trip.

/trips/{tripId}/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Detailed subcollection of expenses associated with a specific trip.

/allowed_users/{email}.description: Whitelisted email entries checked on login.
